source: DPE CPSE Survey 2022-23: aggregate employee cost 18-25% for manufacturing CPSEs. CIL FY25: 20%, BHEL FY25: 29%, HAL FY25: 23%.
DPE CPSE Survey 2022-23: 182 profit-making CPSEs, 102 loss-making. CIL FY25 EBITDA: ~28%, HAL: ~22%. BHEL: ~4-5% (turnaround). Loss-making CPSEs: negative EBITDA.
DPE CPSE Survey 2022-23: Infrastructure CPSEs: 20-30% capex intensity. Manufacturing CPSEs: 5-15%. Government capital expenditure programme driving elevated CPSE capex.
CAG reports on CPSEs: excess inventory is a recurring finding. BHEL FY25: inventory days ~180 (order-based manufacturing). CIL: ~30 days (coal stockpile management).
Companies Act Section 135: mandatory 2% of average net profit for last 3 years. CIL FY25: CSR ₹1,800 Cr (~2.5% of PAT). HAL FY25: CSR ₹150 Cr (2.0%).
CIL FY25: ~₹85L/emp (high revenue/employee for mining). HAL FY25: ~₹45L/emp. BHEL FY25: ~₹20L/emp (capital goods with high WIP). DPE Survey 2022-23.
